name: Basil Hawkins
description:
__Affiliations:__ Hawkins Pirates; Beasts Pirates
__Occupations:__ Pirate Captain; Headliner; 
__Origin:__ North Blue 
__Height:__ 210 cm (6'10½") 
__Bounty:__
~!Before timeskip: 249,000,000 Beli
After timeskip: 320,000,000 Beli!~

Basil Hawkins is an infamous pirate from North Blue known as the "Magician" and the captain of the Hawkins Pirates. He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the "Worst Generation".

 ~!After encountering Kaido, he joined the Beasts Pirates and became one of the crew's Headliners.!~
